pros: A19 Pro — fastest mobile chip ever
48 MP triple camera with 5x periscope zoom
5000 mAh battery — biggest ever in Pro Max

detailed_content.intro: The iPhone 17 Pro Max isn't just another yearly update; it's a massive leap in how we interact with our screens. With the jump to a 6.9-inch display, Apple has pushed the limits of the 'Max' branding, yet the Grade 5 Titanium frame keeps it surprisingly light in the hand. The real magic, however, lies under the hood with the A19 Pro chip. It's not just about winning benchmark wars—it's about the seamless way it handles 8K video recording and on-device Apple Intelligence without breaking a sweat or killing your battery by noon. For the photography crowd in Bangladesh, the new 48MP periscope lens is the game-changer we've been waiting for. It finally brings that elite zoom capability that was previously the domain of Samsung ultras, but with Apple's signature natural color science and class-leading video stability. Whether you're navigating the busy streets of Dhaka or capturing a quiet sunset in Sylhet, this camera system feels like carrying a professional rig in your pocket. In a market where unofficial prices can be tricky, the 17 Pro Max stands out as a 'future-proof' investment that will likely hold its value better than any other device released this year.
why_love_it: Stunning 6.9" Super Retina XDR display with 3000 nits peak brightness for unmatched clarity.
Pro-level triple 48MP camera system with LiDAR for sharp photos and breathtaking 3D video.
Apple A19 Pro chip built on 3nm for unbeatable performance in gaming and multitasking.
Ultra-fast 5G connectivity and the latest Wi-Fi 7 support.
Stronger, lighter design with Ceramic Shield 2 protection and IP68 water resistance.
All-day battery life with super-fast wired and MagSafe wireless charging.
Next-gen Face ID & satellite connectivity for safety anywhere.

special_features.title: Pro Camera System
special_features.content: Triple 48 MP Pro Fusion cameras: The system includes a wide, ultrawide, and periscope telephoto lens — letting you zoom much more without losing quality. Sensor-shift OIS & LiDAR Scanner: For stability and depth, especially in low light. Night shots are substantially better with less noise. 4K up to 120 fps, Dolby Vision HDR, ProRes and ProRes RAW workflows, Apple Log 2.

special_features.title: Display & Design
special_features.content: 6.9-inch LTPO Super Retina XDR OLED, 120Hz refresh rate: Smooth scroll, dynamic refresh for battery savings, vibrant colors, HDR10, Dolby Vision. Peak brightness up to ~3000 nits. Ceramic Shield 2 & Mohs level protection + IP68 rating: Front glass is much more scratch resistant; entire body built tough (up to 6m for 30 mins).

special_features.title: Performance & Power
special_features.content: A19 Pro (3 nm process): Very efficient, very fast. High performance in gaming, pro apps (video editing, AR). Up to 12GB RAM + up to 2TB storage options. NVMe storage means read/write is fast. Thermal Management: Aluminum body and design helps dissipate heat.

special_features.title: Battery & Charging
special_features.content: Large battery capacity for heavy usage. Fast wired charging: 50% in ~20 minutes using PD-compatible charger. Wireless charging with MagSafe / Qi2 (~25W), and reverse wired charging for accessories. OS (iOS 26) + chip improvements mean better power management.

special_features.title: Connectivity & Extra
special_features.content: Advanced connectivity: Full 5G, tri-band Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6.0, UWB for precision detection. USB-C 3.2 Gen 2 with DisplayPort for faster data transfer. Face ID, SL 3D sensors, TrueDepth front camera with Center Stage features.

faq.q: What are the storage options available?
faq.a: iPhone 17 Pro Max storage options are: 256GB, 512GB, 1TB and 2TB. All storage options are NVMe type to deliver blazing fast data transfer rates.

faq.q: Does the iPhone 17 Pro Max support dual SIM?
faq.a: Yes. It supports dual SIM: International (Nano-SIM + eSIM), USA (eSIM only), and China (Dual Nano-SIM).

faq.q: Can I buy it with an EMI plan?
faq.a: While we don't sell directly, most major retailers in Bangladesh offer EMI up to 36 months through partnered banks for this model.

faq.q: Is the 1-year international warranty valid in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, Apple's 1-year international warranty is generally honored by authorized service providers in Bangladesh, provided the model is not a carrier-locked unit from another country.

faq.q: Why is there such a large difference between official and unofficial prices?
faq.a: Official prices include high import duties, VAT (usually 20-30%), and the cost of maintaining a local service network. Unofficial units often bypass these formal import channels, allowing for lower price points but potentially limited local support.

faq.q: Does Apple Intelligence work fully in Bangladesh?
faq.a: As of iOS 19, Apple Intelligence features are available globally. However, some localized features like specific Siri actions or region-based suggestions might still be rolling out for the South Asian market.

faq.q: Is the new 45W fast charging safe for long-term battery health?
faq.a: Apple uses 'Optimized Battery Charging' and intelligent thermal management to ensure that 45W speeds don't degrade the lithium-ion cells prematurely. It's safe, but using a certified PD (Power Delivery) charger is highly recommended.

detailed_content.intro: The iPhone 17 Pro represents a paradigm shift in Apple's design philosophy, moving away from the premium titanium frame of its predecessor to a sleek aluminum unibody that feels remarkably premium in the hand. At 6.3 inches, it strikes the perfect balance between screen real estate and pocketability, making it the ideal choice for users who want the Pro experience without the Pro Max's imposing footprint. The A19 Pro chip inside is a marvel of engineering, delivering desktop-class performance while maintaining remarkable energy efficiency. For Bangladeshi users who are serious about mobile photography, the triple 48MP camera system is nothing short of revolutionary. The new periscope telephoto brings distant subjects closer with 4x optical zoom, while the LiDAR scanner transforms low-light shots and enables advanced augmented reality experiences. The shift to aluminum doesn't mean compromise — Ceramic Shield 2 ensures the display remains virtually scratch-proof, and the device maintains its IP68 water resistance rating. What makes this device particularly appealing in the Bangladesh market is its position as a more accessible gateway to the Pro ecosystem. While unofficial prices remain competitive, the device offers nearly all the capabilities of the Pro Max at a significantly lower price point.
why_love_it: Brilliant 6.3" Super Retina XDR display with 3000 nits peak brightness.
Revolutionary triple 48MP camera system with LiDAR for professional-grade shots.
A19 Pro chip delivers unmatched performance in a 3nm package.
ProRes and Apple Log 2 support for videographers.
Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 6.0 for future-ready connectivity.
Sleek aluminum unibody with Ceramic Shield 2 protection.
Satellite emergency features for safety anywhere.

special_features.title: Pro Camera System
special_features.content: Triple 48 MP Pro Fusion cameras featuring a wide main sensor, periscope telephoto with 4x optical zoom, and ultrawide lens with 120° field of view. The LiDAR scanner enables Night mode portraits, faster autofocus, and AR experiences. Supports 4K@120fps ProRes video, Dolby Vision HDR, and Apple Log 2 for professional color grading.

special_features.title: Display & Design
special_features.content: 6.3-inch LTPO Super Retina XDR OLED with 120Hz ProMotion. Always-On display shows widgets without draining battery. Peak brightness reaches 3000 nits for outdoor visibility. Ceramic Shield 2 offers superior drop protection, while the aluminum unibody provides structural integrity at a lighter weight.

special_features.title: Performance & Power
special_features.content: A19 Pro built on 3nm process with 6-core CPU and 6-core GPU. Neural Engine handles on-device AI tasks including Siri enhancements, photo processing, and Apple Intelligence features. 12GB RAM ensures smooth multitasking. Thermal design maintains performance under sustained load.

special_features.title: Battery & Charging
special_features.content: 3998 mAh battery (4252 mAh in eSIM model). 45W wired charging reaches 50% in 20 minutes. 25W MagSafe wireless charging. Reverse wired charging at 4.5W for AirPods and Apple Watch. iOS optimization delivers all-day battery life.

special_features.title: Connectivity & Security
special_features.content: Full 5G support with mmWave capability in select models. Wi-Fi 7 tri-band for faster speeds. Bluetooth 6.0 improves audio device connectivity. USB-C 3.2 Gen 2 enables DisplayPort output. Face ID with SL 3D sensor for secure authentication. Satellite features include Emergency SOS, Messages, and Find My.

faq.q: What storage options are available?
faq.a: iPhone 17 Pro comes in 256GB, 512GB, and 1TB storage variants, all using fast NVMe technology.

faq.q: Does it support dual SIM in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, it supports Nano-SIM + eSIM in Bangladesh. The eSIM can be activated with local carriers that support eSIM.

faq.q: What's the difference between Pro and Pro Max?
faq.a: The Pro Max has a larger 6.9-inch display, larger 5000 mAh battery, 5x periscope zoom (vs 4x), and 8K video recording capability.

faq.q: Is the 45W charging safe for battery health?
faq.a: Yes, Apple's optimized battery charging and thermal management ensure safe fast charging without degrading battery longevity.

faq.q: Does Apple Intelligence work in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Most Apple Intelligence features work globally, though some region-specific features may have limited availability.

faq.q: What's the warranty situation in Bangladesh?
faq.a: International warranty is valid; however, service center availability may be limited to major cities.

faq.q: Is the aluminum build as durable as titanium?
faq.a: The aluminum unibody provides excellent durability while being lighter. Ceramic Shield 2 on the front offers premium drop protection.

detailed_content.intro: The iPhone 17 Slim, also known as iPhone 17 Air, represents Apple's boldest departure from conventional smartphone design in years. At just 7.2mm thick and weighing a mere 170 grams, it's the thinnest iPhone ever created, yet it doesn't compromise on the essentials that make an iPhone special. The 6.6-inch display is larger than the standard iPhone 17, offering an immersive viewing experience that rivals the Pro Max without the bulk. This device is clearly aimed at a specific audience: those who prioritize aesthetics and portability above all else but refuse to sacrifice performance. The A19 chip ensures that whether you're scrolling through social media, editing photos, or playing games, the experience remains buttery smooth. The single 48MP camera with sensor-shift optical image stabilization is surprisingly capable, delivering photos that rival many multi-camera setups in good lighting conditions. For the fashion-conscious Bangladeshi user who wants a phone that turns heads, the iPhone 17 Slim is an undeniable statement piece. It's not about having the most cameras or the biggest battery — it's about having a device that feels like an extension of yourself, something that looks as good in your hand as it performs.
why_love_it: Ultra-sleek 7.2mm profile — the thinnest iPhone ever.
Spacious 6.6" Super Retina XDR display with 120Hz.
Powerful A19 chip handles everything effortlessly.
48MP main camera with advanced stabilization.
Wi-Fi 7 for blazing-fast connectivity.
Premium color-infused glass back.
Face ID and Apple Intelligence support.

special_features.title: Ultra-Slim Design
special_features.content: At just 7.2mm, the iPhone 17 Slim is Apple's thinnest phone ever. The aluminum frame provides structural strength while keeping weight under 170 grams. Color-infused glass back offers a unique aesthetic that won't fade over time.

special_features.title: Large LTPO Display
special_features.content: 6.6-inch Super Retina XDR OLED with 120Hz ProMotion. The larger display is perfect for content consumption, gaming, and productivity. 3000 nits peak brightness ensures visibility in bright outdoor conditions.

special_features.title: A19 Chip Performance
special_features.content: Apple A19 delivers excellent performance for everyday tasks and demanding applications. The 5-core GPU handles casual gaming and AR experiences with ease. Apple Intelligence features are fully supported.

special_features.title: 48MP Camera System
special_features.content: Single 48MP Fusion camera with sensor-shift OIS delivers exceptional photos. Photonic Engine enhances computational photography. 4K@60fps video with Dolby Vision HDR is supported.

special_features.title: Battery & Charging
special_features.content: Despite the slim profile, the 3500 mAh battery provides all-day usage. 35W wired charging and 20W wireless charging keep you powered up quickly.

faq.q: What makes iPhone 17 Slim different from iPhone 17?
faq.a: The Slim has a larger 6.6" display versus 6.3", is thinner (7.2mm vs 8mm), and weighs less (170g vs 177g).

faq.q: Does the single camera limit photography?
faq.a: For most users, the 48MP sensor with computational photography covers 90% of shooting scenarios. Low-light and zoom are the main limitations.

faq.q: Is the battery life adequate given the slim design?
faq.a: The A19 chip's efficiency and iOS optimization ensure all-day battery life for typical usage.

faq.q: What colors are available?
faq.a: Black, White, Mist Blue, Sage, and Lavender.

faq.q: Does it support 5G in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, it supports 5G on all major bands used by Bangladeshi operators.

detailed_content.intro: The iPhone 17 is the most compelling non-Pro iPhone in years, representing a massive leap forward for the standard model. With the A19 chip now featuring a 5-core GPU and full Apple Intelligence support, you're getting processing power that was previously reserved for Pro models. The display has grown to 6.3 inches while maintaining the same footprint as its predecessor, and the 120Hz ProMotion technology makes every interaction feel incredibly smooth. The dual-camera system is genuinely impressive — the 48MP main sensor with sensor-shift OIS captures stunning photos in any lighting condition, while the 48MP ultrawide gives you more creative flexibility than ever before. What makes this particularly attractive in the Bangladesh market is the balance of features and price. At unofficial prices around 82,000 Taka for the base 256GB model, it's positioned as an accessible entry point into the iOS ecosystem without the compromises that used to define non-Pro iPhones. The five available colors — Black, White, Mist Blue, Sage, and Lavender — offer something for every personality, with the color-infused glass back promising durability that won't fade over time. For users upgrading from older iPhones or those making the switch from Android, the iPhone 17 delivers an experience that punches well above its weight class.

special_features.content: 3692 mAh battery provides impressive endurance. 35W wired charging reaches 50% in just 20 minutes. 25W MagSafe wireless and 4.5W reverse charging offer versatile power options.

special_features.title: Design & Colors
special_features.content: Premium aluminum design with Ceramic Shield 2 protection. Color-infused glass back in five options: Black, White, Mist Blue, Sage, and Lavender. IP68 water resistance ensures durability.

faq.q: How does iPhone 17 compare to iPhone 17 Pro?
faq.a: Pro has A19 Pro chip (6-core GPU vs 5-core), triple cameras vs dual, LiDAR scanner, ProRes video, and more premium build.

faq.q: Does it support 5G in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, it supports comprehensive 5G bands including sub-6 GHz and mmWave.

faq.q: Is the battery life good?
faq.a: The 3692 mAh battery with A19 efficiency delivers all-day battery life for most users.

detailed_content.intro: The iPhone 16 Pro Max represents the pinnacle of Apple's 2024 technology, offering the largest display ever on an iPhone coupled with the most powerful chip in the company's history. The 6.9-inch Super Retina XDR display is nothing short of breathtaking — whether you're watching movies, playing games, or just browsing, the 120Hz ProMotion technology makes everything look incredibly smooth. The A18 Pro chip inside is a powerhouse that handles everything from intensive gaming to 4K video editing with remarkable ease. The camera system has received significant upgrades, with the 48MP main sensor capturing stunning detail in any lighting condition, while the 5x periscope telephoto brings distant subjects closer than ever before. For Bangladeshi users who demand the best, the Pro Max delivers an experience that justifies its premium positioning. The titanium frame provides the perfect balance of strength and weight, and the Ceramic Shield ensures your investment stays protected. At unofficial prices around 165,000 Taka for the base 256GB model, it's a significant investment, but one that pays dividends in daily use.

detailed_content.intro: The iPhone 16 Pro delivers the complete Pro experience in a more compact form factor that fits comfortably in the hand. At 6.3 inches, it's the perfect size for users who want the power of the Pro Max without the bulk. The A18 Pro chip inside is identical to its bigger sibling, meaning you sacrifice nothing in terms of performance. The camera system is equally impressive — the 48MP main sensor captures stunning photos, the 5x periscope telephoto brings distant subjects close, and the 48MP ultrawide provides creative flexibility. The introduction of the Camera Control button is a game-changer for photography enthusiasts, providing tactile feedback for adjusting settings without taking your eyes off the viewfinder. For Bangladeshi users, the iPhone 16 Pro strikes the ideal balance between features and portability. It's powerful enough for professional work, compact enough for daily carry, and priced more accessibly than the Pro Max. Whether you're upgrading from an older iPhone or switching from Android, the 16 Pro represents a significant leap forward in mobile technology.

detailed_content.intro: The iPhone 16 Plus offers the large-screen iPhone experience without the premium price tag of the Pro Max. With its 6.7-inch Super Retina XDR display, it's perfect for those who consume a lot of content on their phone — whether that's streaming videos, browsing social media, or playing games. The A18 chip is a significant upgrade from previous generation, delivering performance that rivals the previous Pro models while maintaining excellent battery efficiency. The 48MP main camera with sensor-shift optical image stabilization is genuinely impressive, capturing detailed photos in any lighting condition. While the ultrawide camera doesn't match the Pro models' resolution, it still delivers excellent results for landscapes and group shots. What makes the 16 Plus particularly attractive in the Bangladesh market is its price-to-performance ratio. At unofficial prices around 95,000 Taka for the base 128GB model, it's significantly more affordable than the Pro Max while still offering a large, beautiful display and capable cameras. The five vibrant color options — Black, White, Pink, Teal, and Ultramarine — ensure there's something for everyone, and the color-infused glass back promises durability that won't fade over time.
why_love_it: Spacious 6.7" Super Retina XDR display.
A18 chip with excellent performance.
48MP main camera with sensor-shift OIS.
All-day battery life at 4674 mAh.
Five vibrant color options.
Wi-Fi 7 connectivity.
Affordable large-screen iPhone option.

special_features.title: Large Display
special_features.content: 6.7-inch Super Retina XDR OLED provides an immersive viewing experience. Dynamic Island houses the front camera and sensors. 2000 nits peak brightness ensures outdoor visibility.

special_features.title: A18 Performance
special_features.content: Apple A18 chip delivers excellent performance for everyday tasks and gaming. 5-core GPU handles casual gaming and graphics. Apple Intelligence features are fully supported.

special_features.title: Dual Camera System
special_features.content: 48MP main camera with sensor-shift OIS captures detailed photos. 12MP ultrawide provides 120° field of view. Photonic Engine enhances computational photography.

special_features.title: Battery Life
special_features.content: 4674 mAh battery provides excellent endurance for a non-Pro model. 30W wired charging and 25W MagSafe wireless charging supported.

special_features.title: Design
special_features.content: Premium aluminum design with Ceramic Shield protection. Color-infused glass back in five vibrant options. IP68 water and dust resistance.

faq.q: How does iPhone 16 Plus compare to iPhone 16 Pro?
faq.a: Pro has 120Hz display, A18 Pro chip, triple cameras, and titanium build. Plus has 60Hz display but larger 6.7" screen and better battery.

faq.q: Does it have 5G support in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, comprehensive 5G support including sub-6 GHz and mmWave.

faq.q: Is the 60Hz display noticeable?
faq.a: Some users notice the difference coming from Pro models, but it's still smooth for everyday use.

faq.q: Does it support Apple Intelligence?
faq.a: Yes, the A18 chip supports all Apple Intelligence features.

faq.q: What's the battery life like?
faq.a: Excellent — the 4674 mAh battery easily lasts all day for most users.

detailed_content.intro: The iPhone 12 Pro marked a turning point in Apple's design language when it launched in late 2020 — a return to the flat-edged stainless steel frame reminiscent of the classic iPhone 4 and iPhone 5, but updated with thoroughly modern internals. At 6.1 inches, it found the sweet spot that many users still prefer today: a display large enough for comfortable media consumption and productivity, yet narrow enough to handle comfortably with one hand. The A14 Bionic chip, built on TSMC's 5-nanometer process, was the first 5nm SoC in any smartphone, and its six-core CPU and four-core GPU still hold up remarkably well for everyday tasks, social media, and even demanding games in 2025. What truly set the Pro apart from the standard iPhone 12 was the triple-camera array with a dedicated 12MP telephoto lens offering 2x optical zoom, a LiDAR scanner for rapid autofocus in low light, and Dolby Vision HDR video recording — a feature that made this the go-to device for mobile filmmakers and content creators in Bangladesh. The Ceramic Shield front glass, developed jointly with Corning, introduced a level of drop resistance that previous generations simply couldn't match. Despite being several years old, the iPhone 12 Pro remains a compelling choice for Bangladeshi buyers who want a premium device with proven reliability, solid camera performance, and a timeless design — especially now that unofficial prices have dropped to incredibly accessible levels around Tk 55,000 for the base 128GB model.
why_love_it: Stunning 6.1" Super Retina XDR OLED display with 1200 nits peak HDR brightness.
Triple 12MP camera system with LiDAR for Night mode portraits and fast autofocus.
A14 Bionic chip — first 5nm smartphone SoC with exceptional efficiency.
First smartphone with Dolby Vision HDR video recording up to 60fps.
Ceramic Shield front glass — 4x better drop performance than previous generations.
Premium stainless steel frame with surgical-grade precision and IP68 rating.
5G connectivity for future-proof networking in Bangladesh.
MagSafe accessory ecosystem for magnetic mounts, wallets, and chargers.

special_features.title: Pro Camera System with LiDAR
special_features.content: The triple 12MP setup includes a wide main sensor with f/1.6 aperture and sensor-shift OIS, a 12MP telephoto lens with 2x optical zoom at 52mm, and a 12MP ultrawide with 120° field of view. The TOF 3D LiDAR scanner measures the time it takes light to reflect back from objects, enabling Night mode portraits, significantly improved low-light autofocus, and advanced AR experiences. Video capabilities include 4K recording at up to 60fps in Dolby Vision HDR — a professional-grade workflow previously unavailable on any smartphone. ProRAW support gives photographers the flexibility to edit photos with more dynamic range and color data.

special_features.title: Ceramic Shield & Premium Design
special_features.content: The 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR OLED delivers 1170 x 2532 resolution at ~460 ppi with HDR10, Dolby Vision, and P3 wide color support. Peak brightness reaches 1200 nits for HDR content and 800 nits typical outdoor visibility. The Ceramic Shield front glass contains nano-ceramic crystals embedded in the glass matrix, making it four times more resistant to drops than previous iPhone generations. The surgical-grade stainless steel frame provides structural rigidity and a premium feel that distinguishes it from the aluminum iPhone 12. IP68 water and dust resistance protects against submersion up to 6 meters for 30 minutes.

special_features.title: A14 Bionic Performance
special_features.content: The Apple A14 Bionic, fabricated on TSMC's 5nm process, features a hexa-core CPU with two high-performance Firestorm cores clocked at 3.1 GHz and four high-efficiency Icestorm cores at 1.8 GHz. The four-core Apple GPU handles graphics-intensive gaming and AR applications with ease. The 16-core Neural Engine processes up to 11 trillion operations per second, powering computational photography, Face ID, and on-device Siri tasks. Paired with 6GB of RAM, multitasking remains fluid even by modern standards. AnTuTu benchmarks placed the A14 approximately 100,000 points ahead of the A13 in the iPhone 11 Pro, a generational leap that's still noticeable today.

special_features.title: Battery & Charging
special_features.content: The 2815 mAh Li-Ion battery delivers up to 17 hours of video playback. While this is slightly less than the iPhone 11 Pro's 3046 mAh cell, the A14's improved power efficiency helps balance daily usage. Wired charging supports up to 20W via USB Power Delivery 2.0, reaching 50% in approximately 30 minutes with a compatible adapter (sold separately). MagSafe wireless charging at 15W introduced a new magnetic alignment system that eliminated the frustration of misaligned Qi pads. Standard Qi wireless charging is also supported at 7.5W. Battery health management via iOS Optimized Battery Charging learns your daily routine and delays charging past 80% until you need it, extending overall battery lifespan.

special_features.title: 5G, MagSafe & Connectivity
special_features.content: The iPhone 12 Pro was Apple's first smartphone to support 5G networks, covering both sub-6 GHz and mmWave bands for faster download and streaming speeds — a feature that will become increasingly relevant as Bangladeshi carriers expand their 5G rollout. Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) provides faster local networking with compatible routers. Bluetooth 5.0 handles audio peripherals and accessories. The Lightning port supports USB 2.0 speeds (480 Mbps), which is adequate for file transfers but falls short of the USB-C speeds found in newer iPhones. Ultra Wideband (UWB) enables spatial awareness features like AirDrop directionality and, later, precise item finding with AirTags. MagSafe opened an entirely new accessory category, with magnetic mounts, wallets, battery packs, and chargers snapping perfectly into place on the back of the device.

faq.q: Is the iPhone 12 Pro still worth buying in 2025-2026?
faq.a: Absolutely. At an unofficial price of around Tk 55,000 for the 128GB model, it offers premium build quality, a capable triple-camera system with LiDAR, and the A14 Bionic chip that still handles everyday tasks and gaming with ease. iOS updates are still being released, though the device may reach end-of-life within 2-3 years.

faq.q: What is the difference between iPhone 12 Pro and iPhone 12 Pro Max cameras?
faq.a: The iPhone 12 Pro Max features a larger main sensor with bigger pixels for better low-light performance, a 2.5x telephoto lens (vs 2x on the Pro), and sensor-shift OIS (vs optical OIS on the Pro). For most users, the Pro's camera is excellent, but the Max has a slight edge in challenging lighting.

faq.q: Does the iPhone 12 Pro support 120Hz display?
faq.a: No, the iPhone 12 Pro is limited to a 60Hz refresh rate. Apple introduced ProMotion 120Hz starting with the iPhone 13 Pro lineup. The 60Hz display on the 12 Pro is still smooth thanks to iOS animations, but it won't match the fluidity of 120Hz Android flagships or newer iPhones.

faq.q: What storage variant should I buy?
faq.a: For most users, the 128GB model at Tk 55,000 is the best value. If you shoot a lot of 4K video, use ProRAW photography, or plan to keep the phone for several years, the 256GB variant at approximately Tk 62,000 provides more breathing room.

faq.q: Does it come with a charger in the box?
faq.a: No, Apple removed the power adapter and EarPods from the iPhone 12 Pro box starting with this generation. You'll need to purchase a USB-C power adapter separately or use an existing one. The box includes the phone, a USB-C to Lightning cable, and documentation.

faq.q: How long will the iPhone 12 Pro receive iOS updates?
faq.a: Apple typically supports iPhones for 5-6 years from release. The iPhone 12 Pro launched with iOS 14 in October 2020, meaning it should receive major updates through iOS 19 or possibly iOS 20 (2025-2026). Security patches may continue for an additional year or two beyond that.

faq.q: Is the unofficial/unit imported version safe to buy in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Unofficial (grey market) units are widely available and generally safe if purchased from reputable sellers in places like Bashundhara City or Jamuna Future Park. Always verify the IMEI, check that it's not carrier-locked, inspect the battery health in Settings, and confirm the device isn't iCloud-locked before purchasing.

faq.q: Does MagSafe work in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, MagSafe is a hardware feature and works regardless of region. MagSafe chargers, cases, wallets, and mounts are increasingly available through local retailers and online platforms like Daraz. The magnetic alignment system ensures perfect positioning every time.

Action Button for quick access to favorite features

detailed_content.intro: The Apple iPhone 16 represents a significant step forward in Apple's base-model lineup, bringing many features previously reserved for the Pro series to a more accessible price point. With the introduction of the A18 chip — built on TSMC's advanced 3nm process — the iPhone 16 delivers performance that rivals devices costing significantly more. For Bangladeshi buyers, this phone offers an exceptional value proposition: you get the iconic iPhone experience with a capable 48MP camera system, the versatile Dynamic Island, and Apple's latest on-device AI features, all at a price that doesn't demand a second mortgage. The aluminum frame feels solid yet light at just 170 grams, making it one of the most comfortable phones to hold for extended periods. While it lacks the ProMotion display and telephoto lens of its pricier siblings, the iPhone 16 proves that you don't need every Pro feature to have a world-class smartphone experience. In a market flooded with mid-range Android alternatives, the iPhone 16 stands out for its build quality, long-term software support, and resale value that holds up remarkably well over the years.
why_love_it: Stunning 6.1" Super Retina XDR display with 2000 nits peak brightness for outdoor visibility.
Powerful 48 MP Fusion camera with sensor-shift OIS for stable, detailed photos.
A18 chip built on 3nm for exceptional performance in gaming and multitasking.
USB-C charging finally arrives — one cable for all your devices.
Action Button replaces the mute switch for customizable quick actions.
Dynamic Island brings Pro-level notification and interaction design.
Apple Intelligence features for smarter, more personalized AI assistance.

special_features.title: Dual Camera System
special_features.content: The 48 MP Fusion main camera features a larger sensor with 100% Focus Pixels for faster autofocus. Sensor-shift optical image stabilization compensates for hand shake across multiple axes, ensuring sharp photos even in low light. The 12 MP ultrawide camera now includes autofocus, enabling macro photography down to 2 cm from the subject. Smart HDR 5 intelligently adjusts exposure for each pixel, delivering balanced highlights and shadows. Night mode activates automatically, using computational photography to brighten dark scenes while preserving natural color.

special_features.title: Display & Design
special_features.content: The 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR OLED delivers 1179 x 2556 resolution at 460 ppi with True Tone and P3 wide color support. Peak brightness reaches 2000 nits outdoors — a massive improvement over the iPhone 15's 1600 nits. The Ceramic Shield front offers 4x better drop resistance than standard glass. The aluminum frame is aerospace-grade, providing structural rigidity while keeping weight to just 170g. IP68 water and dust resistance protects against submersion up to 6 meters for 30 minutes.

special_features.title: A18 Performance
special_features.content: The Apple A18, fabricated on TSMC's 3nm process, features a 6-core CPU with two high-performance cores at 4.04 GHz and four high-efficiency cores at 2.20 GHz. The 5-core Apple GPU delivers excellent graphics performance for gaming and AR applications. The 16-core Neural Engine processes up to 19 trillion operations per second, enabling on-device Apple Intelligence features including Writing Tools, Genmoji creation, and enhanced Siri capabilities. Paired with 8GB RAM, multitasking is fluid and app switching is instantaneous.

special_features.title: Battery & Charging
special_features.content: The 3561 mAh battery delivers up to 22 hours of video playback. 20W wired charging reaches 50% in approximately 30 minutes with a compatible USB-C PD adapter. MagSafe wireless charging at 25W and Qi2 at 15W provide convenient charging options. iOS optimization ensures battery health is maintained through Optimized Battery Charging, which learns your daily routine and delays charging past 80% until you need it.

special_features.title: Connectivity & Safety
special_features.content: Full 5G support with sub-6 GHz and mmWave coverage. Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) provides fast local networking. Bluetooth 5.3 improves audio device connectivity. USB-C 2.0 (480 Mbps) enables universal charging. Emergency SOS via satellite connects to emergency services even without cellular coverage. Crash Detection and Fall Detection use advanced sensors to automatically call for help if you're unable to respond.

faq.q: What are the storage options available?
faq.a: iPhone 16 comes in 128GB, 256GB, and 512GB storage variants, all using fast NVMe technology. There is no microSD card slot.

faq.q: Does the iPhone 16 support dual SIM?
faq.a: Yes. It supports Nano-SIM + eSIM in Bangladesh. The eSIM can be activated with local carriers that support the technology.

faq.q: Can I buy it with an EMI plan?
faq.a: While we don't sell directly, most major retailers in Bangladesh offer EMI up to 24 months through partnered banks for this model.

faq.q: Is the international warranty valid in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Apple's 1-year international warranty is generally honored by authorized service providers in Bangladesh, provided the model is not carrier-locked.

faq.q: Does the iPhone 16 have a 120Hz display?
faq.a: No, the iPhone 16 is limited to a 60Hz refresh rate. Apple reserves ProMotion 120Hz for the Pro models.

faq.q: How long will the iPhone 16 receive iOS updates?
faq.a: Apple typically supports iPhones for 5-6 years. The iPhone 16 launched with iOS 18 in September 2024, meaning it should receive updates through iOS 23 or 24.

faq.q: What's the difference between iPhone 16 and 16 Pro?
faq.a: The Pro has a 120Hz ProMotion display, telephoto camera, titanium build, A18 Pro chip, and USB-C 3.0 speeds. The standard 16 offers better value for most users.

detailed_content.intro: The iPhone 15 Pro Max was a watershed moment for Apple, marking the first time the company embraced titanium for its flagship frame and introduced the 5x periscope telephoto lens to the iPhone lineup. For Bangladeshi buyers in 2025, this device represents an incredible value proposition: you're getting the same 3nm A17 Pro chip, the same titanium build quality, and the same revolutionary 5x optical zoom that made this phone a flagship champion at launch — but at a significantly reduced unofficial market price. The shift from stainless steel to Grade 5 titanium shaved nearly 20 grams off the weight, making this the lightest Pro Max ever despite its massive 6.7-inch display. The 5x tetraprism telephoto lens captures stunning portraits at 120mm equivalent, bringing distant subjects closer with optical quality that digital zoom simply cannot replicate. The USB-C port finally brings universal charging and fast 10 Gbps data transfers, a massive upgrade from Lightning's USB 2.0 bottleneck. In Bangladesh's competitive smartphone market, the iPhone 15 Pro Max stands as a testament to what happens when engineering meets design — every detail, from the contoured edges to the precisely machined titanium frame, feels intentional and premium.
why_love_it: Stunning 6.7" LTPO Super Retina XDR display with 120Hz ProMotion and 2000 nits peak brightness.
Revolutionary 5x periscope telephoto brings distant subjects closer with optical quality.
A17 Pro chip built on 3nm for desktop-class performance and efficiency.
Titanium frame is lighter and more premium than previous stainless steel.
USB-C with USB 3.0 speeds for fast data transfers and universal charging.
All-day battery life with 4441 mAh capacity and intelligent power management.
Action Button for customizable quick access to your favorite features.

special_features.title: Pro Camera System
special_features.content: The triple camera system features a 48 MP Fusion main sensor with sensor-shift OIS, a 12 MP periscope telephoto with 5x optical zoom at 120mm, and a 12 MP ultrawide with autofocus for macro photography. The LiDAR scanner enables Night mode portraits, faster autofocus, and AR experiences. Supports 4K@60fps ProRes video, Dolby Vision HDR, and Log video recording for professional color grading workflows.

special_features.title: Titanium Design
special_features.content: Grade 5 titanium frame provides aerospace-grade strength at a fraction of stainless steel weight. The contoured edges feel comfortable in hand. Ceramic Shield front offers 4x better drop resistance. Textured matte glass back resists fingerprints. IP68 water and dust protection up to 6 meters for 30 minutes.

special_features.title: A17 Pro Performance
special_features.content: Built on TSMC's 3nm process, the A17 Pro delivers 10% faster CPU performance and 20% faster GPU performance over A16 Bionic. The 6-core GPU supports hardware ray tracing for console-quality gaming. 8GB RAM ensures smooth multitasking. 16-core Neural Engine handles on-device AI and computational photography tasks.

special_features.title: Battery & Charging
special_features.content: The 4441 mAh battery delivers up to 29 hours of video playback. 27W wired charging reaches 50% in 30 minutes. 15W MagSafe wireless charging. 15W Qi2 wireless charging supported with iOS 17.4+. Optimized Battery Charging learns your routine and delays charging past 80% to preserve battery health.

special_features.title: Connectivity & Safety
special_features.content: Full 5G support with mmWave capability. Wi-Fi 6E tri-band for faster speeds. Bluetooth 5.3 improves audio device connectivity. USB-C 3.0 enables 10 Gbps data transfers and DisplayPort output. Emergency SOS via satellite, Crash Detection, and Fall Detection provide safety features wherever you go.

faq.q: What storage options are available?
faq.a: iPhone 15 Pro Max comes in 256GB, 512GB, and 1TB storage variants, all using fast NVMe technology.

faq.q: Does it support dual SIM in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, it supports Nano-SIM + eSIM in Bangladesh. The eSIM can be activated with local carriers that support the technology.

faq.q: What's the difference between 15 Pro Max and 15 Pro?
faq.a: The Pro Max has a larger 6.7-inch display, larger 4441 mAh battery, 5x periscope zoom (vs 3x on Pro), and is slightly heavier.

faq.q: Is the titanium build durable?
faq.a: Grade 5 titanium is aerospace-grade and extremely durable. It's lighter than steel but equally strong, with excellent corrosion resistance.

faq.q: Does Apple Intelligence work in Bangladesh?
faq.a: The A17 Pro is the minimum chip required for Apple Intelligence. Most features work globally, though some region-specific features may have limited availability.

faq.q: How long will it receive iOS updates?
faq.a: Launched with iOS 17 in September 2023, it should receive updates through iOS 22 or 23 (approximately 5-6 years of support).

faq.q: Is the unofficial price worth it?
faq.a: At Tk 135,000 unofficial vs Tk 159,999 official, the savings are significant. Ensure the unit is not carrier-locked and has valid IMEI before purchasing.

While the Pro Max grabs headlines with its massive screen, the 6.1-inch iPhone 15 Pro delivers virtually the same flagship experience in a form factor that's genuinely comfortable for one-handed use. At the unofficial price point of around Tk 105,000, the iPhone 15 Pro offers exceptional value for anyone who wants the full Apple ecosystem experience in a pocketable package.

faq.a: iPhone 15 Pro comes in 128GB, 256GB, 512GB, and 1TB storage variants. The 128GB base option may feel limited for ProRes video recording.

faq.q: Does it support dual SIM in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, Nano-SIM + eSIM is supported. The eSIM can be activated with local carriers that support the technology.

faq.q: What's the difference between 15 Pro and 15 Pro Max?
faq.a: The Pro Max has a larger 6.7-inch display, larger 4441 mAh battery, and 5x periscope zoom (vs 3x on Pro). The Pro is more compact and lighter.

faq.q: Is 128GB enough storage?
faq.a: For most users, yes. But if you shoot ProRes video or store large photo libraries, consider 256GB or higher.

faq.q: Does Apple Intelligence work in Bangladesh?
faq.a: The A17 Pro is the minimum chip for Apple Intelligence. Most features work globally, though some region-specific features may have limited availability.

faq.q: How long will it receive iOS updates?
faq.a: Launched with iOS 17 in September 2023, it should receive updates through iOS 22 or 23 (approximately 5-6 years).

faq.q: Is the unofficial price worth it?
faq.a: At Tk 105,000 unofficial vs Tk 129,999 official, the savings are substantial. Verify the unit is not carrier-locked and has valid IMEI before purchasing.

pros: Excellent battery life with 4912 mAh capacity
48 MP Fusion camera with sensor-shift OIS

detailed_content.intro: The iPhone 15 Plus is the unsung hero of Apple's 2023 lineup — a phone that delivers a massive 6.7-inch display and best-in-class battery life at a price that won't make you wince. For Bangladeshi users who want the big-screen iPhone experience without paying Pro premiums, the Plus model is the obvious choice. The A16 Bionic chip, while a generation behind the Pro's A17 Pro, remains a powerhouse that handles everything from heavy multitasking to demanding mobile games with ease. The 48MP Fusion camera with sensor-shift OIS captures sharp, detailed photos that rival many Android flagships costing significantly more. What truly sets the Plus apart is its battery life: the 4912 mAh cell easily lasts through a full day of heavy use, and light users can stretch it to a day and a half. The aluminum frame feels solid yet light at 201 grams, and the contoured edges make the large display comfortable to hold. With USB-C finally replacing Lightning, Dynamic Island bringing Pro-level interaction design, and iOS 17 bringing thoughtful features like StandBy mode, the iPhone 15 Plus is a phone that punches well above its price tag.
why_love_it: Stunning 6.7" Super Retina XDR display with 2000 nits peak brightness for outdoor clarity.
Exceptional battery life with 4912 mAh capacity — easily lasts all day.
Powerful 48 MP Fusion camera with sensor-shift OIS for stable, detailed photos.
A16 Bionic chip delivers excellent performance for everyday tasks and gaming.
Dynamic Island brings Pro-level notification and interaction design.
USB-C charging for universal compatibility with all your cables.
Lightweight 201g build despite the large 6.7-inch display.

special_features.title: Dual Camera System
special_features.content: The 48 MP Fusion main camera features a larger sensor with 100% Focus Pixels for faster autofocus. Sensor-shift optical image stabilization compensates for hand shake across multiple axes. The 12 MP ultrawide camera captures 120° field of view for landscapes and group shots. Smart HDR 5 intelligently adjusts exposure for each pixel. Night mode activates automatically for low-light photography. Cinematic mode creates beautiful background blur in videos.

special_features.title: Display & Design
special_features.content: The 6.7-inch Super Retina XDR OLED delivers 1290 x 2796 resolution at 460 ppi with True Tone and P3 wide color support. Peak brightness reaches 2000 nits outdoors. Dynamic Island replaces the notch with an interactive pill-shaped area that shows alerts, timers, and music controls. Ceramic Shield front offers 4x better drop resistance. Aluminum frame provides structural rigidity at 201g. IP68 water and dust protection up to 6 meters for 30 minutes.

special_features.title: A16 Bionic Performance
special_features.content: Built on TSMC's 4nm process, the A16 Bionic features a 6-core CPU with two high-performance cores at 3.46 GHz and four high-efficiency cores at 2.02 GHz. The 5-core Apple GPU delivers excellent graphics performance. The 16-core Neural Engine processes up to 17 trillion operations per second for computational photography and on-device Siri tasks. Paired with 6GB RAM, multitasking is smooth.

special_features.title: Battery & Charging
special_features.content: The 4912 mAh battery delivers up to 26 hours of video playback — among the best in any smartphone. 20W wired charging reaches 50% in 30 minutes. 15W MagSafe wireless charging and 7.5W Qi wireless charging provide convenient options. Optimized Battery Charging learns your routine and delays charging past 80% to preserve battery health.

special_features.title: Connectivity & Safety
special_features.content: Full 5G support with sub-6 GHz and mmWave coverage. Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) provides fast local networking. Bluetooth 5.3 improves audio device connectivity. USB-C 2.0 (480 Mbps) enables universal charging. Emergency SOS via satellite connects to emergency services without cellular coverage. Crash Detection and Fall Detection use advanced sensors to automatically call for help.

faq.q: What storage options are available?
faq.a: iPhone 15 Plus comes in 128GB, 256GB, and 512GB storage variants. There is no microSD card slot.

faq.q: Does it support dual SIM in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, Nano-SIM + eSIM is supported. The eSIM can be activated with local carriers that support the technology.

faq.q: What's the difference between 15 Plus and 15 Pro?
faq.a: The Pro has a 120Hz ProMotion display, telephoto camera, titanium build, A17 Pro chip, and USB-C 3.0 speeds. The Plus has better battery life and a larger display at a lower price.

faq.q: Is the 60Hz display noticeable?
faq.a: If you're coming from a 60Hz phone, no. If you're used to 120Hz, yes. For most users, the 6.7-inch display size more than compensates for the lack of high refresh rate.

faq.q: How long will it receive iOS updates?
faq.a: Launched with iOS 17 in September 2023, it should receive updates through iOS 22 or 23 (approximately 5-6 years of support).

faq.q: Does it support Apple Intelligence?
faq.a: No, Apple Intelligence requires A17 Pro or later. The A16 Bionic does not meet the minimum hardware requirements.

faq.q: Is the unofficial price worth it?
faq.a: At Tk 72,000 unofficial vs Tk 89,999 official, the savings are significant. Verify the unit is not carrier-locked and has valid IMEI before purchasing.

The stainless steel frame gives it a premium, jewelry-like feel that aluminum phones simply can't replicate. At 240 grams, it's undeniably heavy, but the weight distribution is excellent. The 4352 mAh battery was the largest ever in an iPhone at launch, and it still delivers outstanding battery life — easily lasting through a full day of heavy use. The triple camera system with 3x telephoto, macro-capable ultrawide, and sensor-shift OIS on the main camera captures stunning photos across every shooting scenario. For Bangladeshi buyers who find modern 6.7-inch phones unwieldy and uncomfortable, this device is a breath of fresh air. At just 140 grams with a 5.4-inch display, it fits in any pocket, any purse, and any hand with effortless grace. The A15 Bionic chip inside is the same processor found in the much more expensive iPhone 13 Pro, meaning you get flagship-level performance in a form factor that no other manufacturer bothers to make anymore. detailed_content.intro: The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra is the undisputed king of Android flagships in 2026. Building on the legendary S Ultra lineage, this year's model pushes every boundary with the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 chip, a staggering 200MP main camera with dual telephoto lenses (3x and 10x optical zoom), and a titanium frame wrapped in Samsung's anti-reflective Gorilla Glass Armor. For Bangladeshi professionals and content creators, the S26 Ultra is more than a phone — it's a complete mobile workstation. The built-in S Pen with 2.8ms latency makes note-taking, sketching, and photo editing feel as natural as pen on paper. The 6.9-inch LTPO AMOLED display peaks at 3100 nits, making it readable even in the harsh midday sun of Dhaka. Samsung's promise of 7 years of OS and security updates means this phone will stay relevant well into the 2030s, making it a smart long-term investment despite the premium price tag.
why_love_it: Stunning 6.9" LTPO Dynamic AMOLED 2X display with 3100 nits peak brightness.
Revolutionary 200 MP camera with 10x optical periscope zoom and AI-enhanced processing.
Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 delivers desktop-class performance for gaming and multitasking.
Built-in S Pen with 2.8ms latency for precision note-taking and creative work.
Titanium build with Gorilla Glass Armor for premium durability.
7 years of guaranteed OS updates for unmatched longevity.
5200 mAh battery easily lasts a full day of heavy use.

special_features.title: 200 MP Quad Camera System
special_features.content: The 200 MP main sensor captures incredible detail, while the dual telephoto setup (3x at 70mm and 10x at 230mm) covers every portrait and zoom scenario. The 50 MP ultrawide with autofocus enables stunning macro photography. AI-enhanced Nightography turns dark scenes into bright, detailed photos. Super HDR ensures vibrant highlights in every shot. 8K video recording at 30fps and 4K at 120fps give filmmakers professional-grade tools.

special_features.title: Titanium Design & Gorilla Glass Armor
special_features.content: Grade 5 titanium frame provides aerospace-grade strength at a fraction of stainless steel weight. Gorilla Glass Armor on both front and back reduces reflections by up to 75% compared to standard glass, making colors pop even in bright sunlight. IP68 water and dust protection up to 6 meters for 30 minutes.

special_features.title: S Pen Integration
special_features.content: The built-in S Pen features Bluetooth connectivity, Air Actions for gesture-based controls, and an industry-leading 2.8ms latency. Use it for precise note-taking, photo editing, translating text on the fly with Live Translate, or navigating the phone hands-free. The pen stores magnetically inside the phone frame.

special_features.title: Battery & Charging
special_features.content: The 5200 mAh battery delivers up to 35 hours of video playback. 45W wired charging reaches 100% in 60 minutes. 15W wireless charging and reverse wireless charging (Wireless PowerShare) let you charge earbuds and smartwatches on the back of the phone.

special_features.title: Galaxy AI & Connectivity
special_features.content: Circle to Search lets you search anything on screen with a simple circle. Live Translate provides real-time translation for calls and messages. Note Assist summarizes and formats notes. Wi-Fi 7 delivers blazing-fast local network speeds. UWB enables precise device finding and secure access.

faq.q: What storage options are available?
faq.a: Galaxy S26 Ultra comes in 256GB, 512GB, and 1TB storage variants, all using ultra-fast UFS 4.0 storage. There is no microSD card slot.

faq.q: Does it support dual SIM in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, Nano-SIM + eSIM is supported. Both SIM slots support 5G, and you can have two active lines simultaneously.

faq.q: How long will it receive software updates?
faq.a: Samsung guarantees 7 years of Android OS updates and 7 years of security patches, meaning support until 2033.

faq.q: Is the 10x optical zoom really useful?
faq.a: Absolutely. The 10x periscope telephoto captures stunning detail at distances that would be impossible with digital zoom. It's perfect for wildlife, sports, and concert photography.

faq.q: Does it come with a charger in the box?
faq.a: No, Samsung does not include a charger. You'll need to purchase a 45W USB-C PD adapter separately.

faq.q: Is the unofficial price worth it?
faq.a: At Tk 185,000 unofficial vs Tk 229,999 official, the savings are significant. Always verify IMEI, warranty status, and that the unit is not carrier-locked before purchasing.

detailed_content.intro: The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 6 was the iconic 2024 clamshell foldable that proved style and substance can coexist. In 2026, it remains an incredible value with the Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 for Galaxy chip delivering flagship performance at a significantly reduced price. For Bangladeshi users who value style without compromising on power, the Z Flip 6 is unmatched. Flex Mode enables hands-free selfies and video calls, while the 3.4-inch cover display lets you check notifications, take selfies, and control music without unfolding. Samsung's 7-year update guarantee ensures this stylish phone will stay relevant well into the 2030s.
why_love_it: Ultra-compact clamshell design that fits any pocket or small bag.

special_features.title: Flex Mode
special_features.content: Half-fold the phone and place it on any flat surface for hands-free selfies, video calls, or watching content. The top half displays the camera or video while the bottom half serves as controls.

special_features.title: Cover Display
special_features.content: The 3.4-inch Super AMOLED cover display lets you check notifications, take selfies using the main camera, control music playback, answer calls, and use widgets without unfolding the phone.

special_features.title: Galaxy AI
special_features.content: Circle to Search lets you search anything on screen. Live Translate provides real-time translation for calls. Note Assist summarizes and formats notes. Photo Assist helps with object removal and generative editing.

special_features.title: Foldable Display
special_features.content: The 6.7-inch main display unfolds to full smartphone size with a 120Hz adaptive refresh rate. Ultra Thin Glass (UTG) ensures durability with a visible crease that's less noticeable than previous generations.

faq.q: What storage options are available?
faq.a: Galaxy Z Flip 6 comes in 256GB and 512GB storage variants using UFS 4.0 storage. There is no microSD card slot.

faq.q: Does it support dual SIM in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, Nano-SIM + eSIM is supported. Both SIM slots support 5G.

faq.q: How long will it receive software updates?
faq.a: Samsung guarantees 7 years of Android OS updates and 7 years of security patches, meaning support until 2031.

faq.q: Is the unofficial price worth it?
faq.a: At Tk 100,000 unofficial vs Tk 129,999 official, the savings are significant. Always verify IMEI and warranty status before purchasing.

detailed_content.intro: The Samsung Galaxy A35 5G is the reliable mid-range workhorse that delivers Samsung's core Galaxy experience at an accessible price point. Launched alongside the more premium A55 in March 2024, the A35 shares the same 50MP camera with OIS, 5000 mAh battery, and Super AMOLED 120Hz display — the only differences lie in the processor tier and build materials. For Bangladeshi users who want Samsung's proven camera system and display quality without spending extra on flagship-tier performance, the A35 hits the sweet spot perfectly. The inclusion of Samsung Knox Vault for hardware-level security is a standout feature rarely found at this price point. With 4 years of guaranteed OS updates and 5 years of security patches, the A35 will remain secure and functional well into 2028-2029, making it a genuinely smart long-term investment.
why_love_it: Large 6.6" Super AMOLED display with 120Hz refresh rate for smooth scrolling.
50 MP main camera with OIS for stable, shake-free photos and videos.
5000 mAh battery with excellent all-day endurance for heavy users.
4 years of guaranteed OS updates for unmatched longevity at this price.
IP67 water and dust resistance for peace of mind in monsoon season.
Samsung Knox Vault provides hardware-level security for banking apps.
microSD card slot supports up to 1TB of expandable storage.

special_features.title: 50 MP Triple Camera System
special_features.content: The 50 MP main sensor with Optical Image Stabilization captures detailed photos even in challenging lighting conditions. OIS compensates for hand shake, enabling sharper night shots and smoother video. The 8 MP ultrawide handles landscapes and group shots with a 120-degree field of view, while the 5 MP macro lens enables close-up photography of small objects. Super HDR processing ensures balanced highlights and shadows in every shot.

special_features.title: Battery & Charging
special_features.content: The 5000 mAh battery delivers up to 28 hours of video playback and easily handles a full day of mixed use. 25W wired charging reaches 100% in approximately 80 minutes. While not the fastest charging in its class, the large battery capacity means you'll rarely need a top-up during the day. Wireless charging is not supported.

special_features.title: Samsung Knox Vault
special_features.content: The A35 includes Samsung Knox Vault — a hardware-isolated security enclave that protects sensitive data like passwords, biometric information, and banking credentials. This is the same security architecture found in Samsung's flagship phones, providing enterprise-grade protection against sophisticated attacks. Perfect for users who rely on mobile banking apps and digital payment services.

special_features.title: Display Quality
special_features.content: The 6.6-inch Super AMOLED display delivers Samsung's signature vibrant colors and deep, true blacks. 120Hz refresh rate ensures smooth scrolling through social media, web pages, and system animations. Always-On Display shows time, notifications, and calendar events without waking the phone. HDR10+ support enhances video streaming quality on platforms like YouTube and Netflix.

faq.q: What storage options are available?
faq.a: Galaxy A35 comes in 128GB and 256GB storage variants with 6GB or 8GB RAM options using UFS 2.2 storage. It also supports microSD card expansion up to 1TB, so you can add affordable storage for photos and videos.

faq.q: Does it support dual SIM in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, Nano-SIM + eSIM is supported. Both SIM slots support 5G connectivity, and you can have two active lines simultaneously.

faq.q: How long will it receive software updates?
faq.a: Samsung guarantees 4 years of Android OS updates and 5 years of security patches, meaning support until 2028-2029. This is exceptional for a mid-range phone at this price point.

faq.q: Is it good for gaming?
faq.a: The Exynos 1380 handles casual games like PUBG Mobile and Free Fire at medium settings smoothly. For heavy gaming at high settings, consider the A55 with its more powerful Exynos 1480 processor.

faq.q: Is the unofficial price worth it?
faq.a: At Tk 26,000 unofficial vs Tk 34,999 official, the savings are significant. Always verify IMEI and warranty status before purchasing from unofficial sources.

The 50MP main sensor captures incredible detail, while the Pixel Neural Core processes each pixel with multi-frame HDR, semantic segmentation, and real-time tone mapping. Night Sight turns near-darkness into vibrant, detailed photos. Magic Eraser removes unwanted objects from photos with a single tap. Best Take swaps faces in group photos so everyone has their best expression. Real Tone ensures accurate skin tones across all ethnicities. Video Boost uses Google's cloud servers to enhance video quality with better HDR, stabilization, and low-light performance.

special_features.title: Tensor G5 — Google's Custom AI Chip
special_features.content: The Tensor G5 is Google's most powerful custom processor, built on Samsung's 3nm process. It features an octa-core CPU, Immortalis G925 GPU, and Google's custom TPU for on-device AI processing. This enables features like real-time translation in 50+ languages, live transcription of phone calls, and on-device image processing that produces DSLR-quality photos without bulky lenses.

special_features.title: AI Call Features
special_features.content: Call Screen lets Google Assistant answer unknown callers and tell you who's calling and why. Hold for Me detects when you're on hold and alerts you when a human picks up. Direct My Call lets you navigate automated phone menus automatically. Wait Times predicts how long you'll wait on hold. These features alone save hours of frustration every month.

special_features.title: Battery & Charging
special_features.content: The 5400 mAh battery delivers up to 36 hours of video playback and easily handles a full day of heavy use. Adaptive Battery learns your usage patterns and limits power to apps you rarely use. 45W wired charging reaches 100% in 55 minutes. 23W Qi2 wireless charging and reverse wireless charging (Battery Share) let you charge earbuds and smartwatches on the back.

faq.q: What storage options are available?
faq.a: Pixel 10 Pro XL comes in 256GB, 512GB, and 1TB storage variants with 16GB RAM using UFS 4.0 storage. There is no microSD card slot.

faq.q: Does it support dual SIM in Bangladesh?
faq.a: Yes, Nano-SIM + eSIM is supported. Both SIM slots support 5G connectivity.

faq.q: How long will it receive software updates?
faq.a: Google guarantees 7 years of Android OS updates and 7 years of security patches, meaning support until 2032.

faq.q: Is the unofficial price worth it?
faq.a: At Tk 175,000 unofficial vs Tk 219,999 official, the savings are significant. Always verify IMEI and warranty status before purchasing.

With its 7.6-inch inner LTPO OLED display that unfolds from a compact 6.3-inch cover phone, the Pixel 9 Pro Fold offers the best of both worlds: a pocketable phone for everyday use and a mini-tablet for productivity, media consumption, and creative work.
